overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character ascending stairs and walking through an elevated pedestrian walkway in a futuristic neon-lit city. The scene features towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, including prominent 'KENDACHI' and 'Fuyutsuki Electronics' signage, under bright daylight with vivid neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway ascending to upper pedestrian level

events.description: character begins ascending the wide concrete staircase
approaching top of stairs, transitioning to open observation deck

agents.ego_description: character walking up a wide outdoor staircase with metal railings, moving toward the upper level of the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage with bold geometric white lettering on dark building facade
wide concrete stairs with silver metal railings and integrated lighting
multi-level road infrastructure with vehicles visible at lower elevation
futuristic illuminated column with cyan lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view of a character ascending a wide outdoor staircase in a futuristic city. The KENDACHI corporate sign dominates the right side of the frame while the character climbs toward an upper pedestrian level, passing a descending pedestrian in a green jacket. Metal railings line the stairs, and traffic is visible on the elevated highway below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation deck with panoramic city views and holographic advertisements

events.description: character turns right to view the surrounding skyscrapers and billboards
camera pans to reveal the Fuyutsuki Electronics building and surrounding neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: character walking along the open-air promenade, pausing to look at the surrounding skyscrapers, billboards, and cityscape views

entered.detail: tall building with large red neon signage reading 'Fuyutsuki Electronics' and Japanese text below
large vertical advertisement displaying muscular figure with 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' text
digital advertisement showing muscular arm holding hammer with 'kh' logo
balcony terrace with tables, chairs, and umbrellas on the Fuyutsuki building

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and enters an open-air observation deck with panoramic views of the cyberpunk cityscape. The Fuyutsuki Electronics building dominates the right side with its red neon signage, while various holographic billboards including 'Real Man's Smell' and 'kh' advertisements fill the view. The character walks along the tiled promenade, turning to take in the scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian skybridge with glass ceiling and neon lighting

events.description: entering covered corridor with glass ceiling and reflective flooring
moving deeper into the corridor where artificial neon lighting becomes more prominent

agents.ego_description: character walking through a futuristic covered walkway with highly reflective floors, passing other pedestrians and digital displays

notable_agents.action: seated figure resting on bench beside large planter box

entered.detail: covered pedestrian corridor with transparent glass roof and cyan neon trim along structural beams
tall vertical digital screens displaying fashion advertisements and product imagery
large rectangular concrete planters containing tropical palm vegetation
highly polished marble or tile flooring reflecting the overhead lights and signage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered skybridge with a glass ceiling and highly reflective marble floors. The space features cyan neon lighting along the structural frames, large digital advertising pillars, and potted tropical plants. The KENDACHI sign remains visible through the glass walls to the left as the character walks deeper into the corridor, passing a seated pedestrian on a bench.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a bustling outdoor staircase into a sleek, enclosed corporate skybridge. It begins with the character climbing wide stairs beneath a dominating KENDACHI sign, passing a pedestrian in a green jacket while traffic flows on the highway below. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens into a panoramic observation deck where the view expands to reveal the red neon of the Fuyutsuki Electronics building and various holographic billboards. The movement then shifts inward as the character leaves the open air to enter a covered skybridge characterized by a glass ceiling and reflective marble floors. Finally, the environment transforms into a polished corridor of cyan neon lighting and digital pillars, passing potted plants and a seated pedestrian while the city remains visible through the glass walls.
